title: Engineering Manager
description:
**About Froda**
 Founded in 2015, Froda’s mission is to democratize access to financing, giving small businesses the same growth opportunities as large ones. Through digital innovation, we’ve transformed the loan process from months to minutes, offering fair, fast, and accessible financing. Now, through embedded lending, we’re integrating our technology with global banks and fintechs, building the next generation of lending infrastructure. Join us in creating opportunities for small businesses to invest in their ideas to the best possible terms.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As an Engineering Manager at Froda, you will lead 2–3 cross-functional product teams and ensure we deliver value clearly, predictably, and with high quality. Working closely with Product Managers and Tech Leads, you will create focus, remove obstacles, and build strong teams that can move fast while maintaining a healthy and reliable platform, working iteratively to ship, learn, and continuously improve our products and systems.
   

  

 Through close collaboration with your teams, you will help shape the technical direction of the areas you lead, connecting business needs with sustainable engineering decisions and ensuring we continuously improve how we build, ship, and learn from what we deliver.
   

  

**In this role, you will:**
* Drive delivery across multiple teams by improving how teams plan, execute, and follow up on their work, ensuring priorities and commitments are realistic and aligned with business goals while supporting iterative delivery and continuous learning
* Identify and manage risks, dependencies, and capacity challenges early
* Support a healthy balance between product delivery and technical improvements
* Coach and develop engineers while fostering a sustainable and high-performing team environment
* Build strong cross-functional relationships across Product, Tech, Commercial, and Partnerships


**This role offers the opportunity to have a real impact on how teams collaborate, deliver, and evolve our platform at a fintech company with strong momentum and a stable foundation, backed by a banking license as a quality stamp.**
**Who are you?**
 We believe you are an engineering leader who thrives in dynamic, fast-moving environments. You enjoy creating clarity in complexity and building teams that deliver value continuously while improving how they work.
   

  

 You are confident in stakeholder dialogue, comfortable navigating ambiguity, and proactive in driving improvements rather than waiting for direction. You lead with calmness, ownership, and a strong sense of accountability.
   

  

 You are fluent in English, Swedish is a plus.
   

  

**We believe you have experience with:**
* Leading engineering teams in a product-focused tech organization
* Driving delivery, planning, and execution across teams with a focus on predictability and quality
* A solid technical background that allows you to understand architectural trade-offs and engineering challenges
* Coaching and developing engineers through continuous feedback and performance follow-up
* Working closely with Product Managers and Tech Leads to balance scope, risk, and long-term improvements
* Improving development processes, ways of working, and engineering practices
* Navigating cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management


**What’s in it for you?**
 At Froda, you’ll be part of a company that combines the best of both worlds – a fast-moving, high-energy culture with the stability and structure to support long-term success. We’re 100+ ambitious self-starters who genuinely care for each other and the work we do, all while having fun together.
   

  

 Here, you’ll have the opportunity to shape how we execute and scale engineering, influence both delivery and long-term platform evolution, and build high-performing teams with real ownership. With big ambitions and a rapidly evolving business, there’s plenty of room to grow, take initiative, and make a lasting impact on both our company and the industry.
   

  

**Furthermore, you’ll get:**
* An opportunity to play a key role in scaling a fintech platform that powers funding for thousands of entrepreneurs
* A central leadership position in our tech organization, with real influence on how we work and deliver
* Fabulous office overlooking Stockholm
* We prioritize working in the office to maximize the positive impact of in-person collaboration, but we offer flexibility with work hours and remote work
* Competitive compensation package
* Insurance and pension plan


**This role is all about building the teams and execution that power funding for thousands of entrepreneurs, if you're excited by our mission, apply or tell a friend!**

title: Data Warehouse Officer - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for Group Information Systems Directorate (GIS), Data & Corporate Solutions Department (DCS), Data Management Division (DM), Data Engineering Unit (DE), at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 ****Data Warehouse Officer\*****
**.**
**This is a full-time permanent position at grade 5.**
* internal benchmark Officer IT Applications


***Panel interviews are foreseen as from June 2026***
 Purpose
   

  

 You will design, develop, optimise, and maintain ETL processes that supply the EIB Group’s Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms with high‑quality data. You will play a key role in improving the performance, reliability and accuracy of these data pipelines, supporting the Bank’s strategic initiatives and ensuring alignment with industry best practices, technological developments and evolving regulatory standards.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Data Engineering Unit and works in close cooperation with IT and the Data Governance units. You will cooperate with counterparties from all directorates using the Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms.
   

  

 You will work on a daily basis with key external parties (software vendors, providers of outsourced services, peer groups) to optimise service levels and to stay abreast of best practice.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Ensure that the EIBG Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms are in line with the IT policies and that qualitative and quantitative objectives are achieved and define a unified approach for developing ETL within the applications;
* Organise, structure and lead complex business requirement analysis; producing business cases to propose the best possible IT solution while remaining cost effective for the EIBG;
* Lead IT projects under own responsibility and ensuring their delivery within the planned time, scope and budget by anticipating issues and taking mitigation actions;
* Write up the project documentation such as project charter, functional design, test scripts, progress report, reviewing all technical deliverables to meet Data Warehouse Solutions unit objectives;
* Build and maintain ETL jobs according to best practices and establish metrics to monitor data extraction improvements;
* Apply technical knowledge and expertise to define, test, implement and maintain data extractions in line with requirements and in cooperation with reporting officers, data officers, data owners, source system and Data warehouse Solutions unit IT custodians;
* Provide timely support services to end-users, which includes issues resolution, root cause analysis, propose and development improvements;
* Provide expert advice and recommendations and participate on issues related to Data Warehouse and Data Lake activities with focus on data extraction improvements and associated processes to align the EIB Group with best practice;
* Participate in special initiatives that can go beyond the strict boundaries of own domain and that have a specific scope and timing, to ensure the realisation of the initiative within the set scope, time and budget.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Information Technology, Mathematics, Finance or related fields.
* At least 5 years of relevant experience in IT, including experience covering data extraction management, ideally gained within the Data Warehouse/ Data Lake fields in the financial services sector and in an international context.
* Excellent knowledge of project management principles, methods and practices.
* Strong working experience in Public Cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure, …).
* Strong technical knowledge of ETL tools (such as IBM Infosphere Datastage, Talend, Informatica, …) and reporting tools (MS-Power BI or equivalent).
* Strong technical knowledge of Data Lake solutions (such as MS-Data Fabric, Amazon Data Lake, Databricks, Snowflakes,…).
* Experience with creating, testing and implementing business rules for feeding an Enterprise data warehouse.
* Experience with establishing data extraction performance metrics and preventative controls for continuous improvement.
* Proven track record of data extraction improvement and result orientation.
* Good knowledge of big data storage systems (Azure storage account, Lakehouse, Amazon S3)
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*), with a good command of the other. (Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage).


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

*This is an open campaign to consecutively fill open positions. The campaign will remain open until position is filled. Applications will be reviewed in order of receipt.*

title: Kundservicemedarbetare
description:
*Vi söker en kundservicemedarbetare till vårt Order&Delivery team! Är du en serviceinriktad lagspelare med erfarenhet av kundservice som trivs med varierande arbetsuppgifter och problemlösning? Då kan du vara den kollega vi letar efter!*
 AddSecure är en ledande europeisk leverantör av säkra IoT-uppkopplingar och end-to-end lösningar. Vi hjälper våra kunder att optimera sin verksamhet, skapa affärsvärde och säkra viktiga funktioner. Våra lösningar inom pålitlig övervakad larmöverföring uppfyller kraven för att övervaka larmsignaler med högsta säkerhetsnivå. Vårt arbete gör skillnad och räddar liv.
   

  

 Teamet som arbetar med orderhantering är en del av vår Customer Service. Vi är ett dedikerat team på 8 medarbetare som ansvarar för att hantera order och leverans, samt ge support till både interna och externa kunder. Vi strävar efter att säkerställa hög kvalitet och effektivitet i alla våra processer.
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 I rollen hanterar du ärenden kopplade till order och leverans, samt i viss mån teknisk support. Arbetet kräver en lösningsorienterad och analytisk inställning. Du kommer att ha kontakt med våra kunder, via telefon och mail, där kommunikation och support är centrala delar av din roll. Arbetet innebär även användning av bland annat Salesforce, Navision och våra interna tekniska plattformar.
   

  

 Din arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Ge kvalificerad support inom orderhantering, leveransfrågor och konfiguration, både internt och externt,
* Supportera våra kunder vid driftsättning av våra tjänster,
* Regelbunden kontakt med vårt lager, våra säljteam och andra avdelningar för att effektivt lösa våra kunders problem


**Om dig**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en person som uppskattar att ha mycket kontakt både internt och externt, via telefon och mejl. Vi tror att du är flexibel, initiativrik, prestigelös, noggrann och en kvalitetsmedveten lagspelare. Vi söker dig som:
   

  

* Har erfarenhet av kundservice eller liknande serviceyrken och trivs med att ta ansvar.
* Ser möjligheter, är lösningsorienterad, nyfiken och strävar efter att lära dig nya saker samt utvecklas tillsammans med företaget.
* Trivs i en dynamisk arbetsmiljö med varierande tempo och arbetsuppgifter.
* Har en kommunikativ och problemlösande inställning i ditt arbete.
* Är van vid att arbeta med olika IT-system och har god datorvana.


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av kundservice med fokus på teknisk support
* Erfarenhet av Salesforce eller Navision.


 Dina kontakter kommer att vara svenska och internationella, så du behöver behärska både svenska och engelska väl i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
 Våra anställda är vår största tillgång och det är av stor vikt för oss att bygga en kultur där våra medarbetare trivs och vill prestera. Du kommer att vara en del av ett motiverat team i ett internationellt företag. Dessutom erbjuder vi:
   

  

* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Tjänstepension
* Förstärkt föräldrapenning
* Hälsokontroller


 Tjänst: dagtid 8-17
   

  

 Omfattning: heltid, med start så snart som möjligt
   

  

 Hybrid: Nej
   

  

 Plats: Telefonvägen 26, Hägersten, Stockholm
   

  

**Vi kan alla göra skillnad!**
 Om du söker en arbetsgivare som uppmuntrar dig att vara dig själv och att ha roligt på jobbet, där ditt arbete bidrar till en säkrare, smartare och mer hållbar värld, då kan AddSecure vara din nästa arbetsplats. Bli en del av vårt växande internationella team, där varje dag är en möjlighet att bidra till något meningsfullt.
   

  

 Vill du vara med på vår resa? Sök genom att bifoga ditt CV och svara på ett par frågor; vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen är kompetensbaserad och inkluderar intervjuer, referenstagning och eventuella tester. Eftersom ansökningar behandlas och intervjuer genomförs löpande under ansökningstiden, rekommenderar vi att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Bakgrundskontroller genomförs på alla anställda, och det är ett krav att du är berättigad att arbeta i Sverige.
   

  

 #addsecure #joinaddsecure #forasaferandsmarterworld #smartertogether #ioT #alarms #kundservice #customerservice #orderhantering #orderdelivery #support #teknisksupport #servicemedarbetare #logistik #salesforce #navision #iot #addsecure

title: Projektledare digitalisering - hälso- och sjukvård
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Hos Sopra Steria är du mer än en projektledare – du är en nyckelperson i utvecklingen av framtidens digitala hälso- och sjukvård. I denna roll arbetar du i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT, med fokus på att stödja våra kunder i deras digitaliseringsresa inom vård och omsorg.
   

  

 Du leder och driver uppdrag kopplade till införande, utveckling och förbättring av IT-stöd i komplexa vårdmiljöer. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med vårdverksamhet, IT-organisationer, leverantörer och andra intressenter, där din förmåga att skapa struktur, engagemang och framdrift är avgörande.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett starkt team av konsulter med djup kompetens inom digitalisering av vård och omsorg, i en miljö som präglas av kunskapsdelning, kvalitet och samhällsnytta.
   

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**
* Leda och driva projekt och uppdrag inom digitalisering av hälso- och sjukvård
* Stötta kunder vid införande, uppgraderingar och förändringsarbete kopplat till IT-stöd
* Fungera som brygga mellan vårdverksamhet, IT och systemleverantörer
* Säkerställa att lösningar möter både verksamhetskrav och tekniska förutsättningar
* Planera, följa upp och rapportera leveranser enligt etablerade modeller
* Bidra med din erfarenhet i förbättrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ inom vårddigitalisering


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta inom hälso- och sjukvård och som trivs i en rådgivande och ledande roll nära kund, t.ex. som projektledare, applikationsspecialist, förvaltningsledare eller verksamhetsnära expert.
   

  

**Du Har Sannolikt**
* Deltagit i eller drivit förändrings- och/eller utvecklingsprojekt inom hälso- och sjukvården.
* God förståelse för vårdprocesser och informationsflöden
* Vana att arbeta i komplexa organisationer med många intressenter
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt och skapa förtroende på alla nivåer
* Relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av arbete som konsult
* Kunskap i Cambios produktportfölj
* Erfarenhet av införande av systemstöd i större organisationer, t.ex. Cambios journalsystem Cosmic.
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning eller agila arbetssätt
* Certifiering inom projektledning (t.ex. PMI, Prince2 eller motsvarande)


**Varför välja Sopra Steria?**
* En plats där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad – Vi bygger smarta och hållbara lösningar som förbättrar samhälle och verksamheter med användarupplevelsen i centrum.
* Stark företagskultur med Power of Sharing – Vi tror på kraften i kunskapsdelning, transparens och samarbete. Hos oss når vi längre tillsammans.
* Toppbetyg som arbetsplats – Great Place to Work har rankat oss år efter år som en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser och vi har mottagit utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad.
* Del av en europeisk ledare inom digital transformation – Med över 50 000 experter i många länder kan vi både påverka stora projekt och ge dig möjligheter att växa globalt.
* Värderingar som genomsyrar allt vi gör – Vi sätter kundens behov i fokus, prioriterar respekt, professionalitet, nyfikenhet och en kollektiv förmåga att agera positivt och skapa hållbara resultat tillsammans.


**Ansökan**
 Nu vill vi gärna höra lite om dig! Ansök enkelt genom att antingen ladda upp ditt CV eller länka direkt till ditt LinkedIn-konto via annonsen. Om det fortfarande finns något du funderar över är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Berg, marie.berg@soprasteria.com eller Talent Acquisition Partner Svante Larsson, svante.larsson2@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att få höra ifrån dig!
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.

title: Director of Engineering
description:
**Xensam: Join the Future of SAM**
 Xensam is the leader in AI-powered, cloud-based Software Asset Management. Our technology brings clarity to complex IT environments, helping users make smart, data-driven decisions and maximize software ROI.
   

  

 Recognized with the Highest Growth Award and ranked #3 Overall Champion at the Main Software 50 Awards Nordics, we’re scaling fast and looking for people who want to join the journey. At Xensam, you play a key role in a team built on energy, focus, and positivity. We value experience, but even more, the person behind it.
   

  

 Together, we build the future of SAM.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a Director of Engineering to lead and scale engineering execution and people leadership across multiple development teams in our R&D organization. The role is central to building a predictable, scalable, and sustainable engineering organization as the company continues to grow.
   

  

 As Engineering Director, you will focus on establishing consistent and scalable ways of working, developing leaders and teams, and ensuring reliable delivery while maintaining quality, stability, and clear ownership. You will work closely with Product, QA, Security, Infrastructure, and other engineering leaders to ensure alignment, resolve dependencies, and continuously improve how engineering delivers value. The role includes people leadership of around 10-15 engineers and the role reports directly to the VP of Engineering.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead, mentor, and develop multiple development teams, establishing clear roles, ownership, balanced team capacity, and scalable ways of working.
* Support efficient and predictable delivery across teams by resolving blockers, managing dependencies, and supporting priority decisions in close collaboration with product leadership.
* Evolve and standardize engineering practices and tooling to maximize efficiency, stability, and consistency across teams.
* Implement and continuously evolve AI-supported engineering workflows and methodologies that are safe and efficient.
* Collaborate closely with QA and Security leadership to integrate sustainable quality assurance processes and secure development practices into everyday engineering work.
* Drive technical improvement initiatives, including technical debt and component lifecycle management, by clearly articulating trade-offs, risks, and alternative costs in collaboration with product leadership.
* Participate in hiring, onboarding, development and performance management.
* Manage the full lifecycle of consultant engagements, ensuring effective integration with internal teams and alignment with delivery goals.
* Establish and use execution metrics to create transparency, support decision-making, and drive continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* Proven experience in a senior engineering leadership role (e.g. Director of Engineering, Senior Engineering Manager, or similar) with responsibility for multiple teams.
* Strong people leadership skills with a focus on coaching, development, and building scalable organizations.
* Experience establishing consistent and scalable execution models.
* Solid technical background with the ability to engage in architectural and lifecycle discussions without requiring hands-on coding.
* Experience working cross-functionally with Product, QA, Security, and Infrastructure teams.
* Ability to manage complexity and scale in a fast-paced, growing organization.
* Experience using execution metrics to support continuous improvement.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field, or equivalent professional experience.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in fluent English (Swedish is a plus).


**What You Get**
* A generous work culture with free drinks and snacks, office massages, and more.
* Three days in-office (with remote work on Mondays and Fridays).
* An opportunity to shape your career growth while contributing to the company’s success.
* A dynamic position embracing "freedom under responsibility".
* If sales targets are met, all employees enjoy an annual destination trip.
* Other location-specific benefits.


**Our values at Xensam**
**Rebellious**
 We challenge the norm and act with initiative – always with responsibility.
   

  

**Humane**
 We foster a caring, inclusive environment that values diversity and respects individuality.
   

  

**Harmony**
 We value balance and create a supportive workplace where people thrive.
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks on final candidates to fulfill our commitments to customers and ensure a safe work environment.
   

  

 Xensam is the leading provider of AI-powered Software Asset Management technology. Designed to provide SAM Managers and IT Leaders with valuable data, our platform offers a wealth of features to simplify SAM workloads with built-in automation and advanced functionality. We prioritize ease of use and industry-leading security for both On-premise and Cloud software, putting organizations in total control of their hybrid IT environments.

title: AI Engineer
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re looking for
 **AI Engineers** 
 to join our growing team in Stockholm. In this role, you’ll work directly with customers to design, build, and deploy AI-powered solutions that solve real business problems. You’ll combine broad engineering capability with hands-on delivery, moving fast from idea to working prototypes to production-ready value. This role is about creative engineering, co-creation with users, and shaping how enterprises adopt AI in practice.
   

  

 You will also be part of Norrin’s AI Guild, a community where knowledge is shared, skills are developed together, and people actively support each other’s growth.
   

  

**🧩 In This Role, You Will Be**
* Working closely with customers to understand their problems and rapidly design practical AI solutions
* Implementing end-to-end AI/ML workflows, from agents and RAG setups to traditional ML where needed
* Building and deploying cloud-native applications, preferably on Azure
* Applying modern software engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, quality-oriented development)
* Using MLOps approaches to operationalize models, monitor them, and ensure they deliver value
* Integrating with APIs and enterprise systems (REST, events, custom interfaces)
* Working with databases, SQL, and pragmatic data engineering where required
* Navigating between solution shaping, hands-on implementation, and light advisory, depending on the customer phase


**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


 ✨
 **What we value**
* 4+ years of experience in software or data applications, ideally with hands-on AI/ML components
* Experience with AI agents and large language models (LLMs)
* Strong cloud development background (Azure preferred)
* Strong skills in Python and modern engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, testing mindset)
* Experience with deploying and operating ML systems in production
* Solid understanding of APIs, integrations, databases, and SQL
* Ability to frame problems, design pragmatic solutions, and work directly with end-users
* Strong English and Swedish skills (written & spoken)
* Educational background in computer science, applied mathematics, engineering, or similar


**➕ What’s a Plus (but Not Required)**
* Experience with IaC and containerization (Terraform, Docker)
* Familiarity with PyTorch, LangChain/LlamaIndex, deep learning, and LLM evaluation frameworks
* Experience working with data platforms (Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, event streams, data warehouses)
* Background in structured testing approaches to ensure robustness
* Prior consulting or customer-facing engineering experience
* Prior leadership or consulting experience, with the ability to guide teams and advise stakeholders


 📩
 **Your next opportunity might start here**

title: Azure Cloud Engineer

 Vi söker en lösningsorienterad och självgående Cloud Engineer som vill vara med och designa, implementera och vidareutveckla våra kunders Azure-miljöer. Hos oss får du stort ansvar, tekniska utmaningar och möjlighet att påverka både arkitektur och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Som Azure Cloud Engineer arbetar du nära kunder och kollegor i hela leveransen – från behovsanalys och design till implementation och förvaltning. Du kommer bland annat att arbeta med:
   

  

* Design och implementation av Azure-plattformar
* Migreringar från on-prem till Azure
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC) (Terraform och/eller Bicep)

 Som person är du lösningsorienterad och strukturerad, med förmågan att arbeta självständigt samtidigt som du trivs i nära samarbete med andra. Du är kommunikativ, trygg i tekniska diskussioner och har lätt för att förklara komplexa lösningar på ett tydligt sätt. Dessutom är du nyfiken, engagerad och har en stark vilja att fortsätta utvecklas inom moln och säkerhet.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en tekniskt avancerad roll med stort eget ansvar och goda möjligheter att påverka både arkitektur och arbetssätt. Hos oss får du arbeta tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor i en miljö där kunskapsdelning, utveckling och samarbete står i fokus.

title: CRM Analyst — Retention & Lifecycle
description:
**Mission**
 Neko is redefining what prevention means, from treating illness when it arrives, to sustaining health before it's ever at risk. Our mission: make data-driven, preventative care accessible to more people, before symptoms appear.
   

  

 In a single, non-invasive visit under an hour, proprietary technology and direct clinical care combine to deliver personalised, actionable insights. It's a team that thinks in 10x, not 10%. Every role here plays a part in building a world where prevention is the norm, and where your work genuinely helps people live longer, healthier lives.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 Own the retention and lifetime value analytics strategy. Build LTV models, churn prediction, retention dashboards, and cohort analysis. Drive experimentation to improve retention metrics. This is NOT a reporting role — you own the retention narrative, proactively surface insights, and guide the CRM team’s strategic choices.
   

  

**First 6–12-month Outcomes**
 Design and implement an end-to-end LTV model with customer profitability segments
   

  

* Build and maintain retention dashboards (rebooking rate, churn curves, LTV by cohort, reactivation success) with regular updates
* Develop a churn prediction model with meaningful accuracy; implement scoring to identify at-risk customers for proactive campaigns
* Execute high-impact incremental tests on retention messaging and timing; document learnings and impact on LTV
* Deliver regular retention insights reports; proactively recommend experiments or optimisations based on cohort analysis


**Requirements**
* 8+ years in analytics, with significant experience in retention, LTV, lifecycle, or churn analytics
* Expert SQL and Python/R; able to write complex queries and build predictive models
* Deep expertise in cohort analysis, survival analysis, LTV modelling, and retention metrics
* Strong understanding of churn prediction, propensity scoring, and reactivation mechanics
* A/B testing and experimental design for retention initiatives; statistical rigour
* BI tool proficiency (e.g. Tableau, Looker, Metabase); ability to build dashboards and tell the retention story visually
* Strategic, proactive mindset: owning ‘the why,’ surfacing opportunities, and recommending action


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: ERP Application Specialist - Logistics & SCM
description:

title: Sales Consultant
description:
**About Mediaplanet**
 We Create Impact!
   

  

 Mediaplanet is a world leader in content marketing, creating powerful campaigns together with 15,000+ clients globally. We make branding easy by managing the entire value chain – from concept and production to distribution and collaborations with influencers and world-renowned media houses. As part of Caybon, we have 10 offices across Europe and North America.
   

  

***We are now looking for a Sales Consultant***
**About The Role**
 As a Sales Consultant in Sweden, you are responsible for the funding of your campaign and the topic from the idea stage all the way to release date.
   

  

 You will start every quarter with in-depth research about a relevant topic and current trends within a selected industry. You will identify the most important influencers and experts while securing the best possible distribution channels. When funding your campaign, you must pitch the campaign and the Mediaplanet products to the right clients.
   

  

 To be successful in the sales process, it is paramount that you have a thorough understanding of the client’s needs and that you are able to identify which products in our portfolio will match the expectations and goals for the client’s participation in the campaign. Whilst keeping a high pace and focus on bringing in revenue.
   

  

**Your Profile**
* You are curious and hungry to learn about Sales within the Media Industry
* 1-2 years of B2B sales experience
* High drive – Goal-oriented with high energy and thrives in a fast-paced environment
* You like to work in a young and vibrant environment at an office in central Stockholm
* You might have experience from a similar sales job and/or the media industry
* A university degree is preferred but not required – we value the right mindset and experience over formal education.
* Fluency in Swedish is a must.


**Why Mediaplanet?**
 High Degree of Freedom & Impact - You have the opportunity to create impact for clients, yourself and the company.
   

  

 Work in an innovative environment where you can create unique campaigns and collaborations.
   

  

 We have a strong entrepreneurial culture and provide our employees with opportunities to grow and develop.
   

  

 Mediaplanet delivers top class content marketing campaigns together with 15 000+ clients globally. Since the start in Stockholm back in 2002, we have grown into the world’s leading content marketing group with 15 offices across Europe and the North Americas.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
Svea Solar is on the verge of transforming how we manage energy with just the click of a button. We're here to help our customers make the most of their energy usage while also balancing the energy grid with smart, innovative solutions. To bring this vision to life, we're expanding our engineering team and are on the lookout for our next Backend Engineer.
   

  

**About The Role & The Team**
 As a Backend Engineer, you'll join our Sunbeam Labs, where we’re creating digital services that range from energy optimization to virtual power plants. You’ll work closely with a talented and energetic team of engineers and domain experts, all focused on building cutting-edge software solutions that make energy optimization a reality for our customers.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll be involved in every stage of the software development lifecycle, from brainstorming ideas to deployment and ongoing maintenance. Since we’re pioneering services that haven’t existed before, there’s plenty of room for discovery and problem-solving! You’ll be working with thousands of connected devices that we control in real-time, based on measurements taken multiple times per second. Your daily challenges might include figuring out how to distribute work among devices, handling AWS datacenter failovers without a hitch, counting milliseconds and megawatts, and even predicting tomorrow’s sunshine.
   

  

 If you love tackling challenges, writing code, and having fun while doing it, this could be the
   

  

 perfect fit for you!
   

  

 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility / hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 Are we a match?
   

  

 At Svea Solar, we’re all about our values, and we want to make sure they resonate with you too. We’re looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who’s not just experienced, but who’s also passionate about end-to-end development. You should be comfortable with architecture styles and APIs (like REST or RPC) and have strong communication skills with a proactive attitude.
   

  

**Here’s What We’re Looking For**
* You value team success over personal success.
* 10+ years of experience as a backend developer, preferably with .NET and C#
* A solid understanding of architecture styles and APIs
* Great communication skills


**Bonus Points If You Have**
* Knowledge of cloud technologies (we use AWS)
* Experience in the energy sector
* Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
* Experience with time series databases
* Experience working with physical devices


**We are a hybrid team that meets at our office in Alvik Strand 3 times a week.**
 If this sounds like you, we’d love to meet you! Join us on our mission to revolutionize home energy solutions and create a greener, more sustainable future.
   

  

 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: Junior Bid Manager Siemens – Protection and Automation
description:
Vill du arbeta i skärningspunkten mellan teknik, affär och hållbarhet? Är du i början av din karriär och vill utvecklas inom anbuds- och affärsarbete i en global teknikorganisation? Då kan rollen som Junior Bid Manager på Siemens vara nästa steg för dig.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Junior Bid Manager stöttar du arbetet med anbud och offerter inom Siemens lösningar för Protection, Automation och IoT‑tjänster mot energi-, industri- och infrastruktursektorn. Du arbetar nära säljorganisationen, tekniska specialister och projektledning för att säkerställa konkurrenskraftiga, kvalitetssäkrade och kommersiellt hållbara anbud.
   

  

 Rollen ger dig en bred förståelse för Siemens affär, tekniska lösningar och kundernas behov – med goda möjligheter att växa vidare inom bid management, försäljning eller projektledning.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
* Stötta och koordinera anbudsprocessen från förfrågan till inlämnat anbud
* Sammanställa anbudsdokument, kalkyler och kommersiella villkor
* Säkerställa kvalitet, struktur och efterlevnad av interna processer
* Samarbeta med tekniska experter inom skydd, automation och digitala/IoT‑lösningar
* Bidra till risk- och möjlighetsanalyser i anbudsarbetet
* Dokumentera och följa upp erfarenheter för kontinuerliga förbättringar


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har en relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning, exempelvis inom teknik, industriell ekonomi, elkraft, IT eller liknande
* Är i början av din karriär eller har upp till 1–2 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet
* Har ett strukturerat arbetssätt och god administrativ förmåga
* Är kommunikativ och trivs med att arbeta tvärfunktionellt
* Har intresse för teknik, affär och digitalisering
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Meriterande:**
* Erfarenhet av anbudsarbete, projektarbete eller teknisk försäljning
* Kunskap eller intresse för elkraft, skydd & kontrollsystem, automation eller IoT
* God vana av Office 365 och affärssystem


**I denna roll erbjuder vi**
* En utvecklande junior roll i ett internationellt och framtidsinriktat bolag
* Gedigen introduktion, stöd från erfarna kollegor och tydliga utvecklingsvägar
* Möjlighet att arbeta med samhällskritiska och hållbara lösningar
* Flexibla arbetsformer och en inkluderande arbetskultur
* Trygga anställningsvillkor och konkurrenskraftiga förmåner


**Vad Siemens erbjuder?**
 Siemens är inte bara en aktör inom reläskydd och automation, vi är en pionjär och en ledande kraft som driver utvecklingen framåt. Att arbeta hos oss innebär att du får vara med och bygga framtidens energisystem, skydda kritisk infrastruktur och arbeta med meningsfull teknik i en innovativ och global miljö. Det är en plats där din kompetens kan göra verklig skillnad!
   

  

 Låter det som något för dig? Det är en fantastisk bransch att vara del av! En tekniskt utvecklande roll i en växande och samhällskritisk bransch.
   

  

 Tveka inte - ansök idag! Rekryteringen sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdagen. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig rekryterare lotta.lehmusvuori@siemens.com. För kontakt med facklig representant mejla facket.se@siemens.com.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Siemens erbjuder spännande utmaningar och karriärmöjligheter i ett innovativt, globalt företag i framkant av grön teknik. Vår arbetsmiljö är öppen, inspirerande och internationell och vi ger stora möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling. På Siemens finns en uttalad och väl etablerad policy som stödjer mångfald på arbetsplatsen. Vi ser mångfald som en tillgång vilken ger möjligheter till nya perspektiv. Hållbarhet är en integrerad del av vår verksamhet och vi har högt ställda mål och ambitioner. Våra teknologier och lösningar bidrar till att våra kunder kan nå deras hållbarhetsmål och ställa om sina verksamheter mot en mer hållbar framtid. Läs mer på siemens.se

title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.
   

  

**Here Are Some Other Qualities We Are Looking For**
 Be great fun to work with.
   

  

 At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.
   

  

 Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.
   

  

 Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions
* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions
* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions
* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.
* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers
* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development
* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally
* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects


 A day in the life
   

  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures


**About The Team**
 The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.
   

  

 The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. title: 22 - CRM Automation Specialist (French Speaking)
description:
**Profile description:** We're looking for a French-speaking CRM Automation Specialist to support a client's sales and operational workflows on a part-time basis (20h/week).

**Developer profile:** You're a hands-on automation specialist who knows CRM systems inside out. You work independently, communicate clearly in French, and have a track record of building automations that actually stick — not just quick fixes, but structured, maintainable workflows. You're the kind of person who looks at a manual process and immediately sees how to eliminate it.

**Technical requirements:**

* Fluent in French (spoken and written) — non-negotiable
* Solid experience with at least one major CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar)
* Proven experience building automations via Zapier, Make (Integromat), n8n, or native CRM workflow builders
* Ability to audit an existing CRM setup, identify gaps, and implement improvements
* Comfortable with data hygiene — deduplication, field mapping, pipeline structuring
* Familiarity with connecting CRMs to other tools (email, calendars, spreadsheets, etc.)
* Strong written communication and documentation habits

**Tech stack:**

* TypeScript, Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, Better Auth, Anthropic SDK
* DevOps: Linux, Docker, CI/CD, observability, security
* Comfortable with AI tools (vibe coding, agents, development assistants)

**Nice to have:**

* Experience with sales process design or RevOps
* Basic scripting or familiarity with the stack above beyond CRM work
* Experience working in a French-speaking business environment

**ATTENTION UPON DROPPING YOUR APPLICATION:**

Please, immediately send an email to virtuous@tunga.io with subject **'****CRM Automation – Your Name****'** sharing concrete examples of CRM automation work you've done in production.


We're specifically interested in:


CRM platforms you've worked with in depth (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho, or other) and what you built on them


Automations you've designed or implemented — tools used (Zapier, Make, n8n, native workflows, custom code), what they replaced, and the impact


How you've connected CRMs to other systems (email platforms, calendars, spreadsheets, internal tools)


Any work involving the tech stack: TypeScript, Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, or AI-assisted development


How you've worked with French-speaking clients or teams


Please point us to production work, not tutorials, side experiments, or course projects.


A short paragraph per example is enough: what you built, your specific role, the scale or context it operated in, and one or two concrete decisions you made. Links to repos, demos, or write-ups are welcome where you can share them.


Vague answers like "set up some automations at a previous company" won't move you to the next stage, specifics will.

title: Senior Fullstack Test Engineer - Göteborg
description:
Vill du ta en senior testroll där du kombinerar teknisk testning, testautomation och kvalitetssäkring genom hela utvecklingslivscykeln? Vi söker nu en **Senior Fullstack Test Engineer** till ett uppdrag där du får bidra till att vidareutveckla testarbete, automatisering och kvalitet i digitala tjänster.


I rollen arbetar du nära utvecklare, business analysts, testare och andra intressenter för att säkerställa hög kvalitet, stabila leveranser och effektiva testprocesser. Du kommer både att vidareutveckla befintliga automatiserade tester och identifiera nya områden där testautomation kan skapa värde.

### **Om rollen**


Som Senior Fullstack Test Engineer kommer du att ha en bred och teknisk testroll med fokus på UI-, API- och backendtestning. Du arbetar med att analysera krav, bryta ner dem till testfall, säkerställa acceptanskriterier och driva kvalitet i utvecklingsarbetet.


Du kommer även att arbeta med felsökning och analys, exempelvis genom loggar, integrationer och browser DevTools, samt bidra till förbättrad monitorering av befintliga tjänster. Rollen passar dig som har ett testledande mindset och trivs med att både arbeta operativt och driva förbättringar.

### **Exempel på arbetsuppgifter**

* Analysera krav och ta fram testfall för nyutveckling
* Säkerställa valideringskrav och acceptanskriterier tillsammans med BA och utvecklare
* Utveckla, underhålla och förbättra automatiserade testsviter
* Identifiera nya områden för testautomation
* Automatisera tester inom UI, API och backend
* Genomföra manuell och explorativ testning vid behov
* Köra automatiserade testsviter och analysera resultat
* Rapportera, analysera och följa upp defekter i icke-produktionsmiljöer
* Undersöka fel i systemtester, drift och incidenter
* Arbeta med testdata i flera miljöer
* Bidra till CI/CD och förbättrade deploy- och releaseprocesser
* Stötta och kompetensutveckla andra testare inom automation, API och backend

### **Vi söker dig som har**

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som testare och/eller testledare
* Stark teknisk bakgrund inom testautomation
* Erfarenhet av att automatisera testfall för UI, API och backend
* Erfarenhet av API-testning med exempelvis Postman eller Insomnia
* Kunskap om mikrotjänster och olika API-typer såsom REST, GraphQL och WebSocket
* Erfarenhet av testautomationsverktyg såsom Cypress, Selenium, Robot Framework eller liknande
* God förståelse för Software Test Life Cycle
* Erfarenhet av test management-verktyg
* Erfarenhet av digitala tjänster
* Mycket goda kunskaper i engelska

### **Det är meriterande om du har**

* Erfarenhet av DevOps och CI/CD-pipelines
* God förståelse för agila principer
* Grundläggande kunskaper inom HTML, CSS och JavaScript
* Erfarenhet av Cypress och/eller Robot Framework
* Erfarenhet av test och automation kopplat till kartbaserade verktyg
* Erfarenhet av AI-verktyg såsom Copilot, AWS Kiro eller liknande
* Svenska språkkunskaper

### **Som person**


Vi tror att du är analytisk, strukturerad och kommunikativ. Du har ett starkt kvalitetsfokus och trivs med att samarbeta nära utvecklingsteam och andra intressenter. Du är självgående, nyfiken på nya tekniker och har ett driv att förbättra både testautomatisering, arbetssätt och produktkvalitet.

### **Vi erbjuder**

* 32 dagars semester
* Full tjänstepension
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Kompetensutveckling
* Stöttande team

title: Azure Cloud Engineer
description:
Vill du ta din expertis inom Azure till nästa nivå? Vi söker en person med erfarenhet inom Microsoft Cloud som vill vara med och designa, bygga och optimera framtidens molnlösningar tillsammans med oss på Accelerate. Hos oss får du inte bara arbeta med moderna tekniker och spännande uppdrag – du blir en del av ett värderingsdrivet och passionerat team där du får goda möjligheter till personlig utveckling.
   

  

**Varför Accelerate?**
 Vi erbjuder dig mer än ett uppdrag – vi erbjuder en plattform för att växa som expert inom Microsoft Cloud så som Azure Infrastruktur, Azure DevOps och andra Microsoft Cloud lösningar! Hos oss får du chansen att arbeta i en modern och framtidsinriktad molnmiljö tillsammans med erfarna kollegor som är Microsoft MVP och Microsoft Certified Trainer inom Azure. Här blir du en del av en kultur där vi lär av varandra och bygger lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad hos våra kunder.
   

  

**Som Konsult Hos Oss Får Du**
* En skräddarsydd utvecklings- och certifieringsplan
* Utmanande och varierande uppdrag med de senaste teknikerna
* Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjuk- och hälsoförsäkring
* Ett sammansvetsat team av vassa specialister som lyfter varandra
* En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner


 Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Azure Cloud Engineer hos oss är du en nyckelspelare i att skapa stabila, säkra och moderna molnplattformar åt våra kunder. Du blir motorn bakom en friktionsfri resa från kod till produktion genom att automatisera, effektivisera och optimera kundernas Azure-miljöer. Vi ser dig som den som frigör kraften i molnet, så att utvecklingsteamen kan fokusera på innovation.
   

  

**Exempel På Vad Du Kommer Att Göra**
* Bygga och underhålla en modern, säker och skalbar infrastruktur i Azure med Infrastructure as Code.
* Hantera lösningar inom PaaS (Platform as a Service) och IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service), inklusive Azure VM, Azure Virtual Desktop, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Container Apps m.m.
* Säkerställa governance och compliance genom att implementera och hantera Azure Policy, RBAC och Workload Identity Federation.
* Optimera och implementera effektiva lösningar för monitorering och loggning med hjälp av Azure Monitor, Log Analytics och Application Insights.
* Säkerställa hög tillgänglighet och lösa komplexa utmaningar inom nätverk och säkerhet i Azure.


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som är har gedigen erfarenhet som Cloud Engineer och som brinner för Cloud lösningar såsom Azure, automation och säkerhet. Du har ett lösningsfokuserat mindset och vill hjälpa våra kunder att bygga hållbara och effektiva molnlösningar.
   

  

 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift. För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
   

  

**Vi Tror Att Du Gillar Att Jobba Med**
* Cloud Infrastruktur: Azure VM, Azure Network, Azure Virtual Desktop, Azure Kubernetes Services
* Azure-tjänster som Function Apps, App Services, Key Vault och Storage Accounts
* Säkerhet och compliance: Entra ID, Managed Identities, RBAC, Azure Policy, Microsoft Security
* Monitorering och loggning: Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights
* Infrastructure as Code: som t ex Bicep
* Erfarenhet av att bygga cloudmiljöer enligt CAF (Cloud Adotions Framework) eller liknande.


**Plus Om Du Har**
* Certifieringar som AZ-104 och/eller AZ-204
* Erfarenhet av: Azure Landing Zones
* AZ-400, AZ-305 eller motsvarande


**Placeringsort**
 Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
   

  

**Vi intervjuar löpande – vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan!**
 Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig! Välkommen till Accelerate**

As part of our team, you’ll help strengthen this partnership and guide organizations in unlocking the full potential of the Databricks platform.

* Design and implement high-performance data pipelines using Databricks and Apache Spark
* Build and maintain secure data lakehouses and data warehouses in Azure
* Integrate AI/ML models into data pipelines using Databricks ML and Azure ML
* Lead solutioning and architecture efforts – from whiteboard to production
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data scientists, analysts, and DevOps engineers
* Participate in presales, technical workshops, and customer presentations


**Your profile**
 We believe you are a senior data engineer or architect with a passion for building scalable, high-impact data solutions. You combine deep technical skills with strong communication and solutioning capabilities.
   

  

*You have:*
* Proven experience designing and implementing data platforms using Databricks, Apache Spark, SQL and Python
* Several years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including services like Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure Data Factory, and Azure ML
* A solid understanding of data architecture, including lakehouse design, data modeling and governance
* Experience working in presales, technical workshops and customer-facing presentations
* A collaborative mindset and the ability to translate business needs into technical solutions


**Databricks Champion – or on your way there**
*We are looking for someone who is either:*
* An official Databricks Champion, recognized for their technical excellence and community contributions, or
* A high-level Databricks expert with the ambition and potential to become a Champion. With Capgemini’s support, network, and close partnership with Databricks, we’ll help you take that next step.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We partner with names such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon and Databricks, which can equip you with valuable certifications in the latest technologies in line with your ambitions.


**Application**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.

title: Senior Streaming Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Senior Streaming Engineer** 
 to join us.
   

  

**I’m Mikael Malmborg, Head of Video Streaming, and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us.** 
 We’re a highly engaged team of experts within our domain focused on
 **building, securing, and scaling the streaming platform that delivers the award winning, world‑class Live and VOD Telia Play service to our Nordic customers** 
 .
   

  

 Within Video Streaming, our mission is simple but ambitious:
   

  

**We make everything behind the “play” button work when it comes to streaming - reliably, securely, and at scale.**
 In Streaming Infrastructure, we operate the backbone of that mission: the ingest, processing, packaging, delivery, observability, and automation that ensure our customers always get a smooth, high‑quality TV and streaming experience.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As a Senior Streaming Engineer, you will together with the team
 **own and evolve our streaming media pipelines, platforms, and tooling that power the Telia Play streaming service across the Nordics.**
* Develop and operate high‑availability, automated streaming infrastructure across Live, VOD, and time‑shifted services.
* Create scalable DevOps workflows, observability capabilities, and tools that ensure reliability, security, and operational excellence end‑to‑end.
* Consult and collaborate with Product, Backend, Player, Network, and Security teams to drive technical strategy, best practices, and long‑term architectural direction.
* Lead improvements within Dynamic Ad Insertion (DAI), DRM, acquisition, encoding, streaming, anti-piracy, cloud scalability, CDN performance, and distributed systems reliability.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You’ll thrive here if you enjoy solving large‑scale technical challenges, driving architectural clarity, and elevating engineering practices across team boundaries.
   

  

* Proven experience in streaming technologies, distributed systems, hardware, OS and cloud‑native DevOps engineering (5+ years).
* Strong knowledge of AWS, media services, DevOps toolchains, Dynamic Ad Insertion, DRM systems (Widevine, PlayReady, FairPlay), streaming protocols (HLS, DASH) and modern observability.
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands‑on problem‑solving, especially in high‑traffic, event‑driven environments.
* Fluency in English and comfort presenting complex technology clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences.


**Important Information:**
* The role includes participating in an on‑call rotation approximately every 6-8 weeks.


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**For Lithuanian applicants only: monthly salary range for this position - 4300-6500 EUR (gross) + annual performance bonuses** 
 . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **June 1** 
**.**
 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background checks will be part of the process.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: 3rd Line NOC Analyst
description:
**3****rd****Line NOC****Analyst**

  

***At Icomera, we build technology that keeps people connected while******they’re******on the move. Every day, our solutions deliver fast, reliable internet and digital services on trains, trams, buses, and coaches - supporting millions of passengers across the world.***


***J******oin Icomera as a 3rd Line NOC Analyst, tackling complex issues across onboard networks where mobility, unstable links, and real-world conditions make troubleshooting anything but routine. This role is for analysts who go beyond resolving incidents—digging into networking, and system behavior to uncover the root causes behind problems others******can’t******explain.***

  

**Job type:**Full-time


**Workplace conditions:**Hybrid

**Location:**Gothenburg, Sweden

  

**About the Role:**


We’re looking for a 3rd line NOC analyst who can take on complex, cross-layer issues that go beyond configuration and require understanding how the system actually behaves under load, mobility, and failure conditions.


Your mission: dig deep, untangle complex issues, and collaborate with product teams to transform uncertainty into clarity. By pinpointing root causes or uncovering the right feature ideas, you’ll help shape elegant, lasting solutions that make a real difference.

  

**Key responsibilities:**


* Investigating escalated issues across onboard systems:
* intermittent connectivity, packet loss, latency spikes
* client experience degradation under load or poor RF conditions
* Analysing packet flow across:

onboard LAN/Wi‑Fi router* cellular uplinks
* Troubleshooting environments with:
* multiple WAN links (LTE/5G/LEO), NAT, QoS, VPNs
* fluctuating signal quality and handovers
* Identifying where problems occur:
* client side, Linux networking stack, configuration, or hardware behavior
* Supporting incident resolution and long-term fixes:
* working with software, embedded, and product teams when needed
* Creating tools, methods, and documentation to improve troubleshooting efficiency
  

**Requirements:**


* Strong Linux troubleshooting skills:
* tcpdump, ip, iptables, logs, system behaviour
* Solid networking knowledge:
* TCP/IP, DHCP, DNS, routing, NAT, VLANs
* Ability to trace issues across layers:
* Troubleshooting across all layers of the OSI model on board and in the cloud
* Experience working with hardware:
* routers, Wi‑Fi APs, or similar network equipment
* Handling unclear or intermittent problems in production system
  

* **The following skills we see as meritorious:**
* Exposure to cellular networks (LTE/5G behaviour, failover, signal impact)
* Experience in high-availability or multi-link environments
* Background in NOC, escalation teams, or advanced support roles
  

**Who You Are:**


You are a curious mind—part detective, part problem-solver—someone who won’t stop at surface-level answers. With a strong foundation in Linux and networking, you enjoy digging into complex issues, following the data, and piecing together what’s really happening across systems. Comfortable working across layers, you persist until you understand the root cause—especially when the problem isn’t obvious.

  

**Our Offer:**


* Health is important – we offer a comprehensive health promotion package to our employees
* Flexible work arrangements – work from home for up to two days a week
* Electrical bike lease agreement via net salary deduction
* ITP Pension and collective bargaining agreement
* A social work environment – board game nights, after works, seasonal parties… The list goes on!
  

***Ready to be part of something exciting and make a real difference in the connected future of transport?******We’d******love to hear from you!***

  

***Practical details:***


We will be reviewing applicants ongoing. Icomera welcomes candidates from all backgrounds, and we value a diverse and inclusive work environment.


We conduct reference checks and background checks as a standard procedure for all final candidates across all recruitment processes.


Icomera is an employer with a collective agreement with TechSverige. If you have questions to our local union representatives, you may contact them at unionen@icomera.com or saco@icomera.com.

  

***About Icomera:***


Icomera is the world’s leading provider of integrated connectivity solutions for trains, trams, buses, and coaches, serving millions of passengers and tens of thousands of vehicles on a daily basis. The IcoCrew now consist of 300+ employees globally. Icomera is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, with main offices in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Germany, France, Ireland, and Italy.  

Icomera’s vision for green mobility within the public transport industry perfectly complements the wider mission of our parent company, Equans. As the global leader in multi-technical services with 74,000 employees working across 17 country hubs, Equans delivers customised solutions which connect, protect and energise territories, cities, buildings, industries and transport infrastructures, empowering their energy, industrial and digital transitions. Visit www.icomera.com for further information.
